"visible", "content-desc": [null], "rel-bounds": [0, 18, 1440, 1239], "focused": false, "selected": false, "scrollable-vertical": false, "children": [{"text": "Instructions:\n1. Sit on heels and place your palms in front of your knees with fingers pointing sideward. Keep your arms straight and press both palms. Stay for 10 seconds. Then turn your fingers toward knees and press the plams. Here maintain 2 to 3 breaths.\n2. Kneeling position. Inhaling, stretch out your arms. Your right arm above the left arm with thumbs pointing down, interlace your fingers.\n3. Exhaling, clasp your hands tightly. Here upturn your arms outward from below. \n4. Stretch your arms and keep them straight. Maintain this pose for 3 to 5 breaths. \n5. Same practice with your left arm above the right one.\n\nFunctions:\n1. Prevents tendinitis; eliminates arm fatigue.\n2. Enhances muscular power and movement of wrist and elbow joints.\n", "resource-id": "imoblife.stretchexercises.lite:id/actItemInfo", "adapter-view": false, "pointer": "516d79b",
